summary: Iteration 15: P1 (Job Title Permissions) and P2 (Reconciliation UI) features tested and verified. Backend: 13/14 tests passed (1 expected fail for existing job titles without permissions). Frontend: All P1 and P2 UI features fully functional.

minor.issue: Existing job titles in DB may not have permissions field (expected - need PUT to add). New job titles correctly get permissions field.

issues: Console warning about <span> inside <tbody> - minor HTML structure issue, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/job-titles - Creates job title with permissions array
Backend: PUT /api/job-titles/{id} - Updates permissions and syncs to linked users
Backend: POST /api/job-titles - Creating without permissions defaults to empty array
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Employee login merges job title permissions
Backend: GET /api/bank-statements - Lists all statements
Backend: GET /api/bank-statements/{id}/reconciliation - Returns rows and summary
Backend: POST /api/bank-statements/{id}/reconciliation/flag - Saves flag
Backend: GET /api/bank-statements/{id}/reconciliation/flags - Returns saved flags
Backend: Flag persistence verified (upsert works correctly)
Backend: No regressions - dashboard, sales, employees, branches all working
UI P1: Employees page loads, Job Titles button visible
UI P1: Job Title Manager dialog opens with permission toggle buttons
UI P1: Permission toggles (Dashboard, Sales, Expenses, etc.) clickable
UI P1: New job title created with selected permissions
UI P1: Job titles table shows permissions column
UI P1: Edit buttons available for each job title
UI P2: Reconciliation link visible in sidebar
UI P2: Reconciliation page loads with statement selector
UI P2: Summary cards display Bank POS, App Sales, Difference, Matched, Discrepancies
UI P2: Reconciliation table shows 37 rows with status indicators
UI P2: Flag button opens dialog with Flag Status dropdown and Notes textarea
UI P2: Status filter and search filter present
UI P2: Status badges (Bank Only, Matched, Mismatch) render correctly
critical_code_review_comments: P1 Implementation correct: JobTitle model has permissions: List[str] = [], default job titles have proper permissions
P1 Auth integration correct: Login merges job title permissions into user, link-user applies permissions
P1 Sync logic correct: PUT /api/job-titles syncs permissions to all linked employees/users
P2 Implementation correct: New endpoints for flag/flags at /api/bank-statements/{id}/reconciliation/*
P2 UI complete: ReconciliationPage renders summary cards, table with status, flag dialog with notes
P2 Sidebar updated: DashboardLayout includes Reconciliation nav item with ArrowDownUp icon
Minor HTML warning: <span> inside <tbody> due to React's dynamic rendering - cosmetic only

success_rate.backend: 93% (13/14 tests passed - 1 expected fail for existing data without permissions)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All P1 and P2 UI features verified working)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_UIJobTitle with dashboard, sales, expenses permissions during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 complete. P1 (Job Title Permissions) fully implemented - job titles now have permissions field, UI has permission toggles in Job Title Manager, permissions sync to users on login/link. P2 (Reconciliation UI) fully implemented - dedicated /reconciliation page with statement selector, summary cards, table with status indicators, and flag/notes feature. Both features working correctly. 18 job titles exist in DB, 1 bank statement with 37 reconciliation rows. No critical issues found.
